PlantUML notice for mdd release artifacts
=========================================

mdd release artifacts bundle an unmodified PlantUML jar for local diagram
rendering.

PlantUML version: 1.2026.3
Download URL: https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml/releases/download/v1.2026.3/plantuml.jar
SHA-256: 53af6760d96bb2737e5e4386e832b46339fc29dec74f412d7c12db7c30db8ec4
Project URL: https://plantuml.com/
Source URL: https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml
License text: https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml/blob/v1.2026.3/license.txt

PlantUML is third-party software and is not part of the mdd MIT-licensed
source tree. The bundled jar is executed as an external Java process by agents
following the `mdd-render-review` project skill or the documented direct Java
invocation.

The PlantUML project license notice states that images generated by running
PlantUML are owned by the author of the corresponding PlantUML source text
and are not covered by the PlantUML program license.
